description: Business letter from Zekharya b. Yaaqov b. al-Shama, from Tripoli (Libya), to Nahray b. Nissim, Fustat. Dating: around 1065 (Gil). The writer is about to travel to Sfax to sell textiles. With the money he will receive, he plans to buy oil and needs 100 jugs for that. Mentions pepper, flax and cotton. (Information from Gil, Kingdom, Vol. 4, #670) VMR
description_he: מכתב עסקי מזכריה בן יעקב בן אל-שמה, מטריפולי, לנהראי בן ניסים, פוסטאט, כ-1065, על מכירת טקסטיל וקניית שמן
